title: Weekly: check safe-to-spend before the weekend
reason: Forecast risk is currently 'watch' and the saved plan's spending_target is tight enough that mid-week impulse spending could break it. A Friday reminder lets the user pause one purchase if needed.

proposed_change.title: Check safe-to-spend before the weekend
proposed_change.notes: Open Month Plan → Forecast tab. If safe-to-spend < $200, defer non-essential spending until the next payroll deposit.
